title: nephelium subfalcatum
intro: Nephelium subfalcatum, also known as the velvet apple or velvet rambutan, is a species of tree in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to Malaysia and is a member of the Rambutan genus, known for its unique fruit. The medicinal properties of Nephelium subfalcatum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Nephelium subfalcatum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection, which can be obtained through herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
